summary: Tested updated wallet and withdrawal system for Trend Syria E-commerce. Backend APIs verified: withdrawal with bank_account option, automatic approval (status: ready_for_transfer), immediate balance deduction, admin mark-transferred API. Frontend wallet page loads correctly with transaction history showing both shamcash and bank_account withdrawals.

minor.issue: Aggressive rate limiting causing 429 errors during testing - not related to wallet features

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Bank account fields (bank_name, account_number, account_holder) are validated when bank_account selected
✅ Shamcash phone is validated when shamcash selected
✅ Withdrawal status is 'ready_for_transfer' (not 'pending') - no admin approval needed
✅ Amount is deducted from wallet immediately upon withdrawal request
✅ GET /api/payment/admin/withdrawals returns bank account details for admin
✅ POST /api/wallet/topup/verify sets status to 'failed' on verification failure (in production mode)
✅ Frontend WalletPage shows both shamcash and bank_account withdrawal options
✅ Frontend displays new statuses (ready_for_transfer, transferred) correctly
Note: Sham Cash Payment Gateway is MOCKED (sandbox=True) - verification always succeeds in sandbox mode

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Wallet page loads, withdrawal form has bank account option)

seed_data_creation: Created test seller user (0945570399) with wallet balance for testing withdrawals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet withdrawal system updated: 1) Bank account option added alongside shamcash 2) Withdrawals auto-approved with status 'ready_for_transfer' 3) Amount deducted immediately 4) Admin confirms transfer via mark-transferred API. Sham Cash is MOCKED in sandbox mode.

backend_withdraw_shamcash.details: POST /api/wallet/withdraw with shamcash returns status: ready_for_transfer, amount deducted immediately

backend_withdraw_bank_account.details: POST /api/wallet/withdraw with bank_account returns status: ready_for_transfer, bank details stored

backend_withdraw_validation_shamcash.details: Missing shamcash_phone returns 400 'يرجى إدخال رقم شام كاش'

backend_withdraw_validation_bank.details: Missing bank details returns 400 'يرجى إدخال جميع بيانات الحساب البنكي'

backend_admin_get_withdrawals.details: GET /api/payment/admin/withdrawals returns list with bank_name, account_number, account_holder

backend_topup_verify.details: In sandbox mode, verification succeeds. Code correctly handles failure case in production.

frontend_wallet_page.details: Wallet page loads, shows balance, transaction history with shamcash and bank_account withdrawals

mocked_apis_list: Sham Cash verify_payment - returns sandbox=True in sandbox mode
